## Quick Start

Get running in under 2 minutes:

```bash
git clone https://github.com/your-org/your-project.git
cd your-project
npm install
npm start
```

After starting, open `http://localhost:3000` in your browser. You should see the dashboard.

## Architecture

flowchart TB
